headline: SIKORA Unveils Three New Product Innovations for the Wire and Cable Industry
summary: SIKORA, part of MAAG Group and Dover (NYSE: DOV), today announced three new solutions designed to improve quality control, increase production efficiency and reduce material usage in cable and wire manufacturing. These innovations include a new addition to the LASER PRO diameter measurement series, the X-RAY 6000 measurement system and the LM PRO length measuring system.
